column2: [S1] As a new user, I want to create an account with my email and a password, so that I can start using the product.
column3: As a new user, I want to create an account with my email and a password, so that I can start using the product.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #1 | Must-have

column2: [S2] As a returning user, I want to log in and log out reliably on web and mobile, so that my data stays protected.
column3: As a returning user, I want to log in and log out reliably on web and mobile, so that my data stays protected.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #2 | Must-have

column2: [S3] As a user, I want to sign up or log in with my Google account, so that I don't have to manage another password.
column3: As a user, I want to sign up or log in with my Google account, so that I don't have to manage another password.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #3 | Must-have

column2: [S4] As a user, I want to reset my password if I forget it, so that I'm never locked out.
column3: As a user, I want to reset my password if I forget it, so that I'm never locked out.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #4 | Must-have

column2: [S5] As a user, I want my session to stay stable across normal daily use, so that I'm not repeatedly logged out in the field.
column3: As a user, I want my session to stay stable across normal daily use, so that I'm not repeatedly logged out in the field.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #5 | Must-have

column2: [S101] As a user, I want to sign up or log in with my Apple account, so that I have a native option on iOS.
column3: As a user, I want to sign up or log in with my Apple account, so that I have a native option on iOS. *(Added per Solution Lab 4 + Technical Considerations; previously deferred.)*  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #101 | Must-have

column2: [S6] As a user, I want a "Remember me" option on login, so that I stay signed in on my own device.
column3: As a user, I want a "Remember me" option on login, so that I stay signed in on my own device.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #6 | Should-have

column2: [S102] As a new user, I want to confirm my email with a one-time code after signing up, so that my account is verified.
column3: As a new user, I want to confirm my email with a one-time code after signing up, so that my account is verified. *(Per Design Review 2 — inclusion in v1 still under discussion.)*  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.A Account Access | PRD Story #102 | Should-have

column2: [S9] As a new Owner/Rancher, I want a short setup step asking my name, ranch/organization, and state (phone optional), so that the product is set up the right way for me.
column3: As a new Owner/Rancher, I want a short setup step asking my name, ranch/organization, and state (phone optional), so that the product is set up the right way for me.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.B Operation Setup Wizard | PRD Story #9 | Must-have

column3: As a new user, I want the setup to be a clear, numbered, multi-step flow (plan → operation → inventory) with visible progress, so that I always know how far along I am.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.B Operation Setup Wizard | PRD Story #10 | Must-have

column2: [S11] As a new user, I want a confirmation screen after setup ("You're in!") that summarizes my plan and points me to set up my profile, so that I feel confident the setup worked.
column3: As a new user, I want a confirmation screen after setup ("You're in!") that summarizes my plan and points me to set up my profile, so that I feel confident the setup worked.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.B Operation Setup Wizard | PRD Story #11 | Must-have

column3: As a new user, I want to be told I can add more ranches and locations later, so that I don't feel I must get everything perfect up front.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.B Operation Setup Wizard | PRD Story #12 | Should-have

column3: As a new user, I want an onboarding step to upload my spreadsheet (CSV/Excel or a Google Sheets export) to import my roster, so that I don't have to add animals one by one.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.C Initial Roster Import | PRD Story #13 | Must-have

column2: [S14] As a new user, I want to Skip the import step and add animals individually later, so that a messy spreadsheet never blocks me from getting started.
column3: As a new user, I want to **Skip** the import step and add animals individually later, so that a messy spreadsheet never blocks me from getting started.  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.C Initial Roster Import | PRD Story #14 | Must-have

column2: [S103] As a new user, after import I want a summary that surfaces any detected co-owners/investors in my sheet and lets me send them invites in one step, so that partners get connected right away.
column3: As a new user, after import I want a summary that surfaces any **detected co-owners/investors** in my sheet and lets me send them invites in one step, so that partners get connected right away. *(Per Solution Lab 3.)*  ||  Module: Authentication & Onboarding | Epic: 1.C Initial Roster Import | PRD Story #103 | Should-have

column2: [S16] As a user, I want plans to clearly show the yearly charge (with the monthly equivalent) and that I can upgrade anytime, so that I understand the real commitment before paying.
column3: As a user, I want plans to clearly show the **yearly** charge (with the monthly equivalent) and that I can upgrade anytime, so that I understand the real commitment before paying. *(Sharpened per Design Reviews 2–3 — yearly billing must be explicit.)*  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.A Plan Selection | PRD Story #16 | Must-have

column2: [S18] As a user, I want to toggle between the Owner and Partner plan views, so that I see the pricing relevant to my role.
column3: As a user, I want to toggle between the Owner and Partner plan views, so that I see the pricing relevant to my role.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.A Plan Selection | PRD Story #18 | Must-have

column2: [S115] As a hesitant new user, I want a 30-day free trial before I'm charged, so that I can evaluate the product before committing.
column3: As a hesitant new user, I want a **30-day free trial** before I'm charged, so that I can evaluate the product before committing. *(Confirmed call 2026-06-19 — 30 days over 7/15. Note: a trial start is a no-charge entry path, so it co-exists with the Story 19 removal; card-on-file mechanics in Open Q17.)*  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.A Plan Selection | PRD Story #115 | Must-have

column2: [S20] As a user, I want to confirm my subscription and pay by card, so that I can activate my plan.
column3: As a user, I want to confirm my subscription and pay by card, so that I can activate my plan.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.B Checkout & Payment | PRD Story #20 | Must-have

column2: [S21] As a user, I want a fast in-app payment — Apple in-app purchase on iOS, or card/Apple Pay on Android & web — so that checkout is quick on my device.
column3: As a user, I want a fast in-app payment — Apple in-app purchase on iOS, or card/Apple Pay on Android & web — so that checkout is quick on my device. *(Reframed per call 2026-06-19: iOS subscriptions use Apple in-app purchase.)*  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.B Checkout & Payment | PRD Story #21 | Must-have

column2: [S22] As a user, I want a clear summary of what I'm paying ("Pro plan — $99, billed yearly") and reassurance I can cancel anytime, so that I pay with confidence.
column3: As a user, I want a clear summary of what I'm paying ("Pro plan — $99, billed yearly") and reassurance I can cancel anytime, so that I pay with confidence.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.B Checkout & Payment | PRD Story #22 | Must-have

column2: [S23] As a user, I want a receipt sent to my email after payment, so that I have a record.
column3: As a user, I want a receipt sent to my email after payment, so that I have a record.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.B Checkout & Payment | PRD Story #23 | Must-have

column2: [S24] As a user, I want a "Go back" option at checkout, so that I can change my plan before paying.
column3: As a user, I want a "Go back" option at checkout, so that I can change my plan before paying.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.B Checkout & Payment | PRD Story #24 | Must-have

column3: As a user, I want to see how many active animals I'm using against my plan limit (e.g., "47 / 200") with a usage bar, so that I know how much room I have.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.C Usage Limits & Upgrades | PRD Story #25 | Must-have

column3: As a user, when I approach or exceed my active-animal limit I want to be alerted and prompted to upgrade — but never blocked; the action proceeds and any overage is added to my next bill. *(Updated per Technical Considerations: over-limit is non-blocking with overage billing, not a hard stop.)*  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.C Usage Limits & Upgrades | PRD Story #26 | Must-have

column3: As a user, I want to change my plan from settings, so that I can upgrade as my herd grows.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.C Usage Limits & Upgrades | PRD Story #27 | Must-have

column3: As a user, I want to see my other usage (media storage used, number of team members), so that I understand the full picture of my account.  ||  Module: Subscription & Billing | Epic: 2.C Usage Limits & Upgrades | PRD Story #28 | Should-have
